nodes.label: AI as pattern recognition accelerator for creative connections
nodes.grounding_span: AI comes in to find the deeper connections between the two pillars of writing and design that I missed but that I would probably have noticed myself across weeks or months

nodes.label: AI as assistant vs AI as expert
nodes.label_negative: AI capable of writing full scenes
nodes.grounding_span: it is a pro at being a brainstorming aide, but in my field of screenwriting, it cannot output screenplay pages at a high level

nodes.label: Sympatico alignment with AI as signal of completion
nodes.grounding_span: we were both in sympatico and had 'clicked' is that I realized I could move on from the scene

nodes.label: AI as supplement to creative process
nodes.label_negative: AI exploring all paths leaving no human role
nodes.grounding_span: the AI goes down specific routes and gets 'stuck' down those paths which is actually not a negative thing. This then forces me to clearly see the other paths

nodes.label: Human judgment over AI suggestions
nodes.grounding_span: I would still say I am confidently driving the arc of the creative decisions while it suggest things I might not be thinking about

nodes.label: AI as tool for overcoming creative block
nodes.grounding_span: I am now fearless to suggest ideas and not be burdened by writer's block

nodes.label: AI as tool for series planning and character development
nodes.grounding_span: have the AI be able to create new interactions with the player as they will ask the characters about things that I did not keep in mind

nodes.label: Creative expression and artistic growth
nodes.grounding_span: This symbiotic relationship between me and the AI is helping me learn and grow

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: cut down the time between knowing what writing and design pitches to pursue

nodes.label: Creative autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: I am now fearless to suggest ideas

nodes.label: Immersive storytelling and player experience
nodes.grounding_span: This will be a game-changer in player immersion

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: This symbiotic relationship between me and the AI is helping me learn and grow

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: if it does get better at writing in screenplay format, that might take away from the human creative input

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: I envision that I will be able to write the core 1,000 lines and backstory for each character in a role-playing game and have the AI be able to create new interactions

nodes.label: Iterative back-and-forth refinement — uses AI as a sounding board to explore and deepen ideas
nodes.grounding_span: It creates a back-and-forth loop where I start to point out to the AI some of the connections it missed

nodes.label: Divergent exploration via AI's limitations — leverages AI's tendency to get stuck to discover alternative paths
nodes.grounding_span: the AI goes down specific routes and gets 'stuck' down those paths which is actually not a negative thing. This then forces me to clearly see the other paths
